items.title: Two Shell Announces New Album Infinite Now
The Short-Lived Heavy Psych Band Who Accidentally Created Southern Rock
items.summary: Recorded by future members of The Allman Brothers Band and Iron Butterfly, The 2nd Coming's shelved ’68 debut is finally seeing release. Read full story on the Bandcamp Daily.

items.title: Mystikal Sentenced to 20 Years in Prison for Rape
items.summary: The rapper admitted to raping a woman at his home in 2022

items.title: Saul Williams Recruits Robert Del Naja, Kamasi Washington for New Album Leap Life
items.summary: Carlos Niño, Gonjasufi, and Moor Mother also appear on the project
